prompt: Watercolour painting — an ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5). A lush garden that seems to dissolve, at one edge, into the brushstrokes of a painting on an easel — flowerbeds of green, red, and blue blending from real flowers into pure colour-strokes. Dreamy, where gardening and painting become the same act. Vibrant yet soft, glowing against a dark ground. Loose luminous watercolour washes, soft wet-on-wet colour bleeds, granulation and visible paper grain, glowing against the dark ground. No text, no labels.
alt: A garden viewed as if it were a painting on an easel — flowerbeds blending into brushstrokes of colour
